description: Execute a GDPR 'Right to be Forgotten' request for user 'john.smith@example.com' in the 'demodb' database. Anonymize the profile by setting Name to 'Erased', Surname to 'User', and Email to 'erased_john_smith@agency.local', while clearing the Gender, Birthday, and Nationality properties. Delete all incoming and outgoing 'HasFriend' edges connected to this user, but preserve all 'HasStayed' edges for financial audits. Create an audit log at /home/ga/gdpr_audit.txt containing the text: 'Processed erasure for RID <rid>', replacing <rid> with the user's actual Record ID.
